mapper.update: UPDATE vr.tn_vr_cncls SET data_qlty_eval = #{dataQltyEval}, mtrlty_eval = #{mtrltyEval}, er_cncls = #{erCncls}, eucr_cncls = #{eucrCncls}, judg_cn = #{judgCn}, indep_review_cn = #{indepReviewCn}, indep_review_user_nm = #{indepReviewUserNm}, final_opnn_cd = #{finalOpnnCd}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE vr_id = #{vrId}
